name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently — no pressure at all, life gets busy and dental visits are easy to put off. We just wanted you to know the door is open whenever you're ready to come back.

If it helps, here's a personal 20% off code for your next cleaning or visit:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days. Use it at checkout the next time you book.

And if there was something about your experience that didn't feel right — the scheduling, the visit itself, anything — I'd genuinely like to hear about it. Just hit reply; a real person reads every message.

Take care either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
